name: Text Chunker
description: Split text, JSON arrays, CSV, or lines into batches. Auto-detects type from file extension (.json, .csv, .txt). Supports streaming 100MB+ files.
doc:
Split content into batches for processing.

Content Types:
• Raw Text - split by character count with optional overlap
• JSON Array - batch array items together
• CSV Rows - batch CSV rows (header preserved)
• Lines - batch lines together

Use Cases:
• Process large files that exceed LLM context limits
• Batch API requests (e.g., 100 items at a time)
• RAG preparation - chunk documents for embeddings

Batch Size:
• Raw text: characters per chunk (with overlap)
• Structured: items per batch

Tip: Use overlap for text to maintain context across chunks.

inputs.name: Input
inputs.description: Content from File Input or File Read node

properties.name: Content Type
properties.description: Auto-detects from file extension, or select manually

properties.name: Batch Size
properties.description: Characters per chunk (raw text) or items per batch (JSON/CSV/Lines)

properties.name: Index Name
properties.description: Name for the document index (used in chunk IDs)
